commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
name: flutter_zoom_image
description: >-
  Flutter image zoom package. Provides ZoomImageWidget (standard images) and
  DeepZoomImageWidget (DZI tile pyramid) with shared gesture + controller layer.
version: 0.0.1
homepage: https://github.com/yourname/zoom_image

environment:
  sdk: '>=3.0.0 <4.0.0'
  flutter: '>=3.10.0'

dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  http: ^1.2.0          # only used by DeepZoomImageWidget tile fetching

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_lints: ^3.0.0
